problem_family: Mesures, simulations et traitements de signaux audio 3D - applications en IA F/H
resources: Construction and organization of corpus of 3D audio signals and associated data.

Tackling tasks such as capture of real scenes: recordings using ambisonic or HOA microphones, camera views (2D and 360), and collection of 'ground truth' data (source acoustic localization by optical tracking and geometry environment survey).
Enrichment of the corpus through simulation of acoustic signals using reverbation algorithms on anechoic sounds.
Characterization of real acoustic sources in terms of radiation and directivity, through measurements in a reverberant room or anechoic chamber.
Familiarity with signal processing and acoustics concepts, tools, and applications related to 3D audio.
